text: Ebbe has parkour this afternoon to close out the week. Sunday brings Frilufsarna Grodan — meet at the car park barrier on Bökebergsvägen 100 in Svedala at 10:00 (back by 14:00, leaders Johanna and Helena). Next week is busy: Ebbe's development talk on Monday, dinner with Kjartansdottir plus Klara's gymnastics on Tuesday evening, and Lo's 5-year BVC health check first thing Friday morning. Two things need doing soon — påsklov signup opened yesterday, and Lo's summer schedule needs to be submitted in Tempus.
